cards.title: Logits
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Retarget checkpoint toward what logits are: raw next-token scores, not probabilities or truth scores.
cards.notes: Current card is accurate but thin. It reuses the softmax interaction and its checkpoint centers Softmax rather than Logits.

cards.title: Softmax
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the current concept target, but make one distractor target the misconception that probability equals truth or confidence.
cards.notes: Current card says probabilities sum to one, but the visual does not show normalization or sum-to-one.

cards.title: Sampling
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep the append-and-repeat checkpoint because it prepares The Day Repeats.
cards.notes: Sampling is the strongest current card in the stage, but top-k/top-p should stay light and probabilities should be visibly weighted.

verification.build: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning
verification.buildPages: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning
